title: Dual lance of longinice longininance w e
display_title: Dual lance of longinice longininance w e
wikitext:
[]: Dual lance of longinice... longininance..... w/e             Quote Post by Nazgullover » Sun Jan 08, 2006 7:49 pm What was it that made the dual lance of longinininininnance? the once that spikes asuke through the head. Seele refered to the one hurled into orbit as it, and asuke the other one, but Seele never seems to notice. I can't get the idea out of my mind as to why this would be, considering how the lance was so important to third impact. At a first glance it would seem it was a cheap imitation, but what was the purpose of it being imitated, or as to why it would even be. Was it the part of the standard Eva series weapon? Oh yea please welcome me to the forums, im sorta new. I am the friend of darkgodchaos that wanted to ask questions. :shock:

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Sun Jan 08, 2006 8:04 pm The MP Evas were all armed with imitiation Lances of Longinus; in SEELEs original plan the MP Evas were to use them to start Third Impact. It ended up that they didn't have to, due to Shogouki summoning the original, but SEELE couldn't have banked on that happening.

[]:             Quote Post by Nazgullover » Sun Jan 08, 2006 8:09 pm Space Penis wrote: The MP Evas were all armed with imitiation Lances of Longinus; in SEELEs original plan the MP Evas were to use them to start Third Impact. It ended up that they didn't have to, due to Shogouki summoning the original, but SEELE couldn't have banked on that happening.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Sun Jan 08, 2006 9:53 pm Eva-01 summoned it? I thought it came on its own.

[]:             Quote Post by Nazgullover » Sun Jan 08, 2006 10:52 pm SEELE 08 wrote: Eva-01 summoned it? I thought it came on its own.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Jan 09, 2006 2:07 am Apparently on the Renewal version (as opposed to the low quality "Mangled" version available in English) there is a distinct AT Field blur as the Longinus no Yari launches from the Moon. SEELE presumably manufactured/cultured the substitutes as part of the Mass Production effort.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Mon Jan 09, 2006 12:26 pm only as a wepon im assuming. I doubt a fake would do the trick of 3I. That just wouldnt be cool lol.

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Mon Jan 09, 2006 12:33 pm I think that the red cross book says that the LoL copy cannot be used for instrumentality. It has almost the same power as the original though

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Mon Jan 09, 2006 1:18 pm Nazgullover wrote: Brilliant, but you left out something. A welcome -.-

[]: Re: Dual lance of longinice... longininance..... w/e             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Mon Jan 09, 2006 1:33 pm Nazgullover wrote: What was it that made the dual lance of longinininininnance? the once that spikes asuke through the head. Seele refered to the one hurled into orbit as it, and asuke the other one, but Seele never seems to notice. I can't get the idea out of my mind as to why this would be, considering how the lance was so important to third impact. At a first glance it would seem it was a cheap imitation, but what was the purpose of it being imitated, or as to why it would even be. Was it the part of the standard Eva series weapon? Oh yea please welcome me to the forums, im sorta new. I am the friend of darkgodchaos that wanted to ask questions. :shock:

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Mon Jan 09, 2006 2:07 pm is ebay the only way to get a hold of a RCB now adays?

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Mon Jan 09, 2006 2:09 pm TheBlueTree wrote: is ebay the only way to get a hold of a RCB now adays?

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Mon Jan 09, 2006 3:10 pm sweet thanks. thats the greatest thing a penis has ever done to me

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Mon Jan 09, 2006 3:35 pm guys I always wanted a LoL-shaped fork :P :roll: ...do they sell anywhere?? :P :dodges flying real longinus lance: ...............what? :mrgreen:

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Mon Jan 09, 2006 4:21 pm I may have missed something but, why is it called the lance of longinus? In history, it got it's name because the man who used it to pierce Jesus' side was named longinus. I doubt longinus was that big and I doubt Jesus was that big. Fill me in.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Jan 09, 2006 4:25 pm Six Winged Angel wrote: guys I always wanted a LoL-shaped fork :P :roll: ...do they sell anywhere??

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Mon Jan 09, 2006 4:28 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Six Winged Angel wrote: guys I always wanted a LoL-shaped fork :P :roll: ...do they sell anywhere??

Seele refered to the one hurled into orbit as it, and asuke the other one, but Seele never seems to notice. I can't get the idea out of my mind as to why this would be, considering how the lance was so important to third impact. At a first glance it would seem it was a cheap imitation, but what was the purpose of it being imitated, or as to why it would even be. Was it the part of the standard Eva series weapon? []:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Mon Jan 09, 2006 4:49 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Six Winged Angel wrote: guys I always wanted a LoL-shaped fork :P :roll: ...do they sell anywhere??

[]: Re: Dual lance of longinice... longininance..... w/e             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Jan 09, 2006 5:12 pm Nazgullover wrote: Iwas refering to the copy of the LoL, the one the Eva series from EoE used, most notably to stab Asuka through the head. i was asking why SEELE never felt the fact that there was another lance was important, considering how important the lance was to 3rd impact. in short, was the other lance a fake or not. and thank you for the welcome.
